zh.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward是Thomas Hereward的兒子，出生。他和Rose至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward是Thomas Hereward的儿子，出生。他和Rose至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Hereward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harward
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hereward, usually representing Old English Hereweard (from here ‘army’ + weard ‘ward, guardian’) but possibly in some cases the cognate ancient Germanic Hariward, Heriward through Norman introduction. This name was borne by an 11th-century thane of Lincolnshire, leader of resistance to the advancing Normans.

nameMeanings.name: Hamelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Dominique, Etienne, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Monique, Normand, Renald.

variants.name: Hamel
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the tree (Old English hæsel), or its light reddish-brown nuts. This is one of the most successful of the names coined in the 19th century from words denoting plants.

en.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward was born as the son of Thomas Hereward. He had at least 1 son with Rose.

fr.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward est né, fils de Thomas Hereward. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Rose.

de.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward wurde, als Sohn von Thomas Hereward geboren. Er hatte mit Rose mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward è nato il come figlio di Thomas Hereward. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Rose.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamelin HerewardはThomas Herewardの息子として生まれた。彼はRoseとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward(은)는 Thomas Hereward의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Rose(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward nasceu filho de Thomas Hereward. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Rose.

ru.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward родился. Его отца звали Thomas Hereward. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Rose.

es.lifeSummary: Hamelin Hereward nació como hijo de Thomas Hereward. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Rose.
